title: Mason Cash in The Forest Owl Mixing Bowl 4 Litre | 26cm Dark Green S18 Stoneware Bowl for Bread, Cake, Cookie, Pastry & Pudding Mixes, Embossed Woodland Design
features: MIXING BOWL | The Mason Cash 26cm Owl Green Mixing Bowl is perfect for cake mixes.
DETAIL | Part of the Mason Cash In the Forest range, this bowl is embossed with owl woodland scenes inspired by folk tales of the mid-19th Century.
CARE & USE | This mixing bowl is dishwasher safe.
IN THE FOREST | Inspired by folk tales of the mid-19th century, the In The Forest range features detailed woodland embossments originally carved by skilled craftsmen.

MASON CASH HERITAGE | Mason Cash has been the choice brand of home cooks and bakers for centuries, with the iconic Mason Cash Mixing Bowl dating back to 1901. Standing the test of time, the brand offers a beautiful selection of kitchenware, cookware, tabletop items, pet bowls, and cake-decorating equipment.
